ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's current manager */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Player's preferred foot */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract started */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract ends */,
  "market_value" TEXT /* Estimated market value of the player */,
  "career_history" TEXT /* JSON array of previous teams and periods */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match */,
  "match_result_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing detailed match results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the standing is associated with */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Number of matches won */,
  "drawn" INTEGER /* Number of matches drawn */,
  "lost" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost */,
  "gf" INTEGER /* Goals For */,
  "ga" INTEGER /* Goals Against */,
  "gd" INTEGER /* Goal Difference */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total Points */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches without conceding a goal */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received */,
  "fair_play_points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for fair play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is held */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season associated with the league */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "promotion_spots" INTEGER /* Number of teams that can be promoted to a higher league */,
  "relegation_spots" INTEGER /* Number of teams that can be relegated to a lower league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the tournament's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the tournament's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Referee's nationality */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Referee's date of birth */,
  "email" TEXT /* Referee's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Referee's phone number */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Referee's certification level */,
  "career_history" TEXT /* JSON array of previous tournaments and periods */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_referees" (
  "match_referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-referee mapping */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "assistant_referee_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fourth official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_assistant_referee_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_referee_1_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_fourth_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("fourth_official_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_assistant_referee_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_referee_2_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player in that match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in that match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received in the match */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken in the match */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target in the match */,
  "pass_success_rate" TEXT /* Pass success rate in the match */,
  "tackles_made" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made in the match */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made in the match */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed in the match */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player is expected to recover */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "recovery_progress" TEXT /* Progress of the recovery */,
  "recovery_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the recovery process */,
  "return_match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the player is expected to return in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_return_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player transferred */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is transferring from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is transferring to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" TEXT /* Transfer fee paid in the transfer */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing details of the contract */,
  "transfer_status" TEXT /* Status of the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, fan) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object containing user preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
